tasks.title: Define contract schemas and workflow-safe types
tasks.summary: Added typed contract schemas for ChangeContract, ContractItem, evidence policies/statuses, review matrix rows, amendments, and TaskContractRefs. Added optional `contract` to ChangeSchema and optional `contract_refs` to TaskSchema. Exported schemas/types from barrel. Added schema tests.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added typed contract schemas for ChangeContract, ContractItem, evidence policies/statuses, review matrix rows, amendments, and TaskContractRefs. Added optional `contract` to ChangeSchema and optional `contract_refs` to TaskSchema. Exported schemas/types from barrel. Added schema tests.

tasks.title: Add contract workflow signals and state mutators
tasks.summary: Added contractSet, contractAmended, and contractReviewMatrixSet signal names, payload schemas, client/workflow bindings, workflow-state field, seed/continue-as-new persistence, and pure state mutators. Contract set derives legacy acceptanceCriteria projection from AC contract items. Added signal/message tests covering contract state, review matrix, amendments, and lastSignalAt behavior.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added contractSet, contractAmended, and contractReviewMatrixSet signal names, payload schemas, client/workflow bindings, workflow-state field, seed/continue-as-new persistence, and pure state mutators. Contract set derives legacy acceptanceCriteria projection from AC contract items. Added signal/message tests covering contract state, review matrix, amendments, and lastSignalAt behavior.

tasks.title: Implement contract validation in change validation path
tasks.summary: Added runContractChecks and integrated it into completeness validation. Checks include duplicate contract IDs, unknown task refs, missing refs on standard/strict code tasks, uncovered required AC items, unknown review refs, missing/failing proof rows, and legacy acceptanceCriteria projection drift. Added validation codes and targeted tests.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added runContractChecks and integrated it into completeness validation. Checks include duplicate contract IDs, unknown task refs, missing refs on standard/strict code tasks, uncovered required AC items, unknown review refs, missing/failing proof rows, and legacy acceptanceCriteria projection drift. Added validation codes and targeted tests.

tasks.title: Update discover and prep workflows for contract minting and task refs
tasks.verification: Checkpoint 6f5684e9f6620812feee87eaebd8ced3c4e6294a created after red/green and incremental verification.
tasks.summary: Updated /adv-discover to mint a typed ChangeContract from approved agreement items before discovery gate completion, including SC/AC/C/DONT/OOS ID rules and acceptanceCriteria projection handling. Updated /adv-prep and prep checklist to require contract_refs during task synthesis when change.contract exists. Added asset tests for discover contract minting and prep task refs. Formatted previously unformatted contract files reported by check.
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated /adv-discover to mint a typed ChangeContract from approved agreement items before discovery gate completion, including SC/AC/C/DONT/OOS ID rules and acceptanceCriteria projection handling. Updated /adv-prep and prep checklist to require contract_refs during task synthesis when change.contract exists. Added asset tests for discover contract minting and prep task refs. Formatted previously unformatted contract files reported by check.

tasks.title: Update review, harden, and archive workflows for contract proof
tasks.verification: Checkpoint 88d102564edb6e791b674820e31a8fe28f7609e3 created after red/green and incremental verification.
tasks.summary: Updated /adv-review to include contract items in review packets and persist contract.reviewMatrix through the contractReviewMatrixSetSignal-backed path before acceptance. Updated /adv-harden to audit contract.reviewMatrix before release scanners. Updated /adv-archive with a Contract Proof Gate and CONTRACT_TRACEABILITY.md archive output expectations. Added asset coverage for the review→harden→archive contract proof flow.
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated /adv-review to include contract items in review packets and persist contract.reviewMatrix through the contractReviewMatrixSetSignal-backed path before acceptance. Updated /adv-harden to audit contract.reviewMatrix before release scanners. Updated /adv-archive with a Contract Proof Gate and CONTRACT_TRACEABILITY.md archive output expectations. Added asset coverage for the review→harden→archive contract proof flow.

tasks.title: Implement archive contract traceability artifact and archive blocking
tasks.verification: Checkpoint 82a9d65c85d85880f0e7311ada956ef9b0282d55 created after red/green and incremental verification.
tasks.summary: Added archive contract proof enforcement and traceability output. Archive now blocks proven-contract changes with missing/stale/unresolved review-matrix proof, unknown task/review refs, or missing amendment audit evidence. Archive bundles now include CONTRACT_TRACEABILITY.md for changes with contracts, and adv_change_archive performs proof checks before existing-bundle recovery. Added archive tests for missing proof, unresolved status, traceability markdown generation, archive output, plus tool test verification.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added archive contract proof enforcement and traceability output. Archive now blocks proven-contract changes with missing/stale/unresolved review-matrix proof, unknown task/review refs, or missing amendment audit evidence. Archive bundles now include CONTRACT_TRACEABILITY.md for changes with contracts, and adv_change_archive performs proof checks before existing-bundle recovery. Added archive tests for missing proof, unresolved status, traceability markdown generation, archive output, plus tool test verification.

tasks.title: Implement re-entry and amendment invalidation behavior
tasks.verification: Checkpoint 74ca14fed588fca1e1525678e9ff23b933af52d2 created after red/green and incremental verification.
tasks.summary: Added contract proof invalidation on gate re-entry before release: if a contract has a review matrix and the change re-enters discovery/design/planning/execution/acceptance, the matrix is cleared so stale proof cannot survive downstream reset. Added pure mutation coverage showing substantive contract amendment invalidates matrix and execution re-entry clears refreshed proof. Verified workflow signal handlers still pass.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added contract proof invalidation on gate re-entry before release: if a contract has a review matrix and the change re-enters discovery/design/planning/execution/acceptance, the matrix is cleared so stale proof cannot survive downstream reset. Added pure mutation coverage showing substantive contract amendment invalidates matrix and execution re-entry clears refreshed proof. Verified workflow signal handlers still pass.

tasks.title: Update specs and durable documentation for contract spine
tasks.verification: Checkpoint 7939dc600ef9857aaa67070958663dffe1faf875 created after red/green and incremental verification.
tasks.summary: Added structural contract traceability requirements to advance-workflow and archive contract proof gate requirements to advance-delivery, including JSON specs and durable docs/specs mirrors. Added asset coverage that asserts spec IDs and docs are wired. Verified command asset tests, pnpm run check, and spec citation invariant.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added structural contract traceability requirements to advance-workflow and archive contract proof gate requirements to advance-delivery, including JSON specs and durable docs/specs mirrors. Added asset coverage that asserts spec IDs and docs are wired. Verified command asset tests, pnpm run check, and spec citation invariant.

tasks.title: Run final end-to-end verification for contract spine
tasks.verification: Final verification completed. Checkpoint returned clean at 7939dc600ef9857aaa67070958663dffe1faf875; no new commit needed.
tasks.summary: Ran final end-to-end verification for structural contract spine. `pnpm test`, `pnpm run check`, and `pnpm run build` all passed from plugin/. `adv_change_validate strict: true` passed with warnings only: NO_DELTAS and PROPOSAL_TASK_DRIFT for scaffold proposal Intent/Scope sections.
tasks.implementation_summary: Ran final end-to-end verification for structural contract spine. `pnpm test`, `pnpm run check`, and `pnpm run build` all passed from plugin/. `adv_change_validate strict: true` passed with warnings only: NO_DELTAS and PROPOSAL_TASK_DRIFT for scaffold proposal Intent/Scope sections.

wisdom.content: After ADV worktree creation, apply_patch without an absolute worktree path edits the original session cwd/main checkout, not the worktree. Use absolute worktree paths for apply_patch when current session cwd remains main.

Contract validation should stay stage-tolerant: validate structural refs and failing provided proof in validateChange, but defer missing review-matrix hard-blocking to archive/review phases so prep/execution validations do not block before review exists.

proposal.approval_evidence: User approved proposal/problem framing with reply `approve`; proceed to discovery/research for complete idea planning.

discovery.approval_evidence: User approved discovery agreement with reply `approve`. Agreement persisted with objectives, AC1-AC7, constraints/avoidances, initial design direction, and open design questions.

design.approval_evidence: Design validator returned CAUTION, not CONFLICT. Required specificity items were incorporated: acceptanceCriteria projection rule, signal payloads, re-entry/amendment invalidation, file placement, review matrix construction, archive validation layer. No user-value/product tradeoff or contract-compromise risk remains; design can proceed to prep.

planning.approval_evidence: User approved prep/task graph with reply `approve`. Task graph contains 9 tasks covering schemas, workflow signals/state, validation, command workflows, archive enforcement, re-entry/amendment invalidation, specs/docs, and final verification. Final verification task reclassified to separate_verification with user approval.

execution.approval_evidence: Execution complete: all 9 tasks done. Verification passed: pnpm test, pnpm run check, pnpm run build. adv_change_validate strict passed with warnings only (NO_DELTAS, scaffold proposal drift). Worktree clean at 7939dc600ef9857aaa67070958663dffe1faf875.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User accepted delivered work with reply `accept`. Review verdict approved: all tasks completed, verification passed (pnpm test, pnpm run check, pnpm run build), no blocking review findings remain.

release.approval_evidence: User signed off archive with reply `sign off`. Release readiness verified: all tasks done, all prior gates complete, strict validation passed with warnings only, full tests/check/build passed, conformance status has no required specs.

clarify_findings.message: Proposal has no Scope section. What files and modules will be affected?
